location: Purchased for 1,000 Runes from the Nomadic Merchant stationed beside the Castle Morne Rampart Site of Grace in Weeping Peninsula.
tactics: Castle Morne Rampart grace is near the Weeping Peninsula's southern castle siege area — approach from the coast road rather than through the castle interior if you just want the merchant.
Cheap early buy; good backup shield before finding a metal one.
lore: A wooden roundshield reinforced with metal bands — light and easy to handle, though it can't negate damage as reliably as a true metal shield.

builds.name: Early Strength build
builds.why: Cheap, light (4.0 weight) Strength-scaling shield with decent 94% physical block for the Weeping Peninsula stage of the game.
